description_long: This is a vintage-style lantern with a metallic, copper-colored frame and a clear glass enclosure that protects the internal light source. The lantern features a rounded base, a cylindrical glass chamber, and a domed top with a vented cap. Two sturdy, curved side arms connect the base to the top, providing structural support and a classic silhouette. A thin, arched metal handle is attached to the top, allowing the lantern to be easily carried or hung. The glass enclosure reveals an internal wick and burner, suggesting it is designed for use with oil or kerosene. The surface of the metal frame is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving the lantern a polished appearance.
description: A vintage copper-colored lantern with a clear cylindrical glass enclosure, arched handle, and smooth, glossy metal frame. The internal wick and burner are visible, indicating an oil or kerosene light source.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched handle, clear glass enclosure, and visible internal wick and burner.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved side arm and the cylindrical shape of the glass enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the handle and glass enclosure visible, but the internal burner is less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other curved arm and the rounded base, with the handle extending upward.
